caption: A man is seated in a studio setting, positioned in front of a professional microphone. He wears a black t-shirt with the text "HECK IT" visible on the chest, a black baseball cap with a logo, and over-ear headphones. He is smiling and looking slightly to his left, away from the camera. The background is white with recurring logos and text, including "BOSS HUSTLE" accompanied by rows of stars. A monitor in the background displays the words "BOSS TALK 101". On-screen graphics include a podcast logo on the left that says "PODCAST" and a logo on the right that reads "BOSS TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a stationary seated position, with only slight movements in his facial expression and posture as he continues to smile and look toward the side.
